events.title: Three Venues
events.description: Three Venues From daytime catch-ups to late-night energy. Food & Drinks Bar Square Fresh food and daily specials from 12pm, friendly service and a room that feels alive, any day of the week. Late night live music Time Square Time Square is our late-night space with DJs, live acts and high-energy nights take over from midnight, the go-to late-night experience in the centre of Ballina. Traditional pub Paddy Macs This is our traditional Irish pub next door, a place you'll receive a warm welcome, a proper pint, live music, conversation and the unmistakable local atmosphere it’s known for.

events.title: What's On
events.description: What's On Multiple Dates Fri, 24 Apr Late Night DJ Sets / Bar Square Details 24 Apr 2026, 23:30 – 25 Apr 2026, 03:30 Bar Square, Garden St, Ballina, Co. Mayo, Ireland Every Friday at Bar Square we play the best DJ set in town to kick-start your weekend right.

events.title: McShane’s Bar
events.description: McShane’s Bar here at Great National Hotel Ballina is a warm and welcoming traditional Irish pub with a vibrant atmosphere. McShane’s Bar not only offers our guests and locals a wide choice of beers, wines, spirits and a selection of delicious cocktails but also fabulous and top-quality food served all day long and weekend music and entertainment. Relax and unwind with a drink and a freshly cooked meal in the cosy surrounds of the McShane’s Bar. McShane’s Bar Our extensive cocktail menu is sure to tickle your taste buds with a wide variety of beautifully balanced Cocktails, many blended with local spirits. Our mixologist’s craft a new Cocktail of the Month experimenting with flavours and is a firm favourite with our regular customers and hotel guests. Treat yourself to sparkles by the glass with our Prosecco ‘Frizzenti’, fresh from the tap into the glass. Our wine of the month provides customers with two of the highest quality wines with detailed tasting notes and food pairing suggestions for each. Whether you are enjoying a meal, a drink after work, a night out with friends, a family break away or just out for a pint to watch the game, a great evening and night is always guaranteed at McShane’s Bar. Sport at McShane’s Bar If there is a big game happening, you can be sure we are showing it live in McShane’s Bar. Join us in McShane’s Bar for the biggest sporting fixtures whether it be Irish Rugby, GAA, Soccer, Golf you name it, in a vibrant atmosphere and all in 55” HD. Live Music & Entertainment McShane’s Bar is the place to be at the weekends with live music and entertainment every weekend and on selected midweek nights. Both residents and locals are always welcome. Book a table, enjoy a fine meal, relax with great company and great music. Get in Touch If you have any queries please contact us via phone or email. Phone: +353 96 23600 Email: info@hotelballina.ie

events.title: Traditional Local Irish Pub
events.description: Traditional Local Irish Pub Paddy Mac’s is the traditional side of the venue, a cosy Irish pub which locals love. It's known for its friendly atmosphere, live music and proper pints. It’s a place to settle in, catch up with friends and enjoy the kind of pub night Ballina is famous for. ​ Whether you’re calling in for a quiet drink, staying for the music or starting your night before heading next door, Paddy Mac’s offers a relaxed, welcoming space with plenty of character.
